narrative:
Warren City 4D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 866 registered voters, with 73.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.7 percentage points.
